title: Arrival-Price TCA Logger — Per-Trade Slippage Tracker
summary: At signal fire time, snapshot the mid-price (bid+ask)/2 as the 'arrival price'. When the fill confirmation arrives via the Order Fill Watcher, compute fill_price minus arrival_price as implementation shortfall in bps, and log to a TCA table. This feeds directly into the existing Alpha Decay Chart infra and makes execution quality visible. Without this, Decifer is flying blind on whether paper fills are realistic.
expected_impact: No direct P&L impact at build time, but enables identification of systematic slippage patterns worth 5–20 bps per trade class; industry data shows typical TradFi broker TWAP slippage is -1 to -2 bps, with poorly optimised algos seeing -10 to -15 bps arrival slippage
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
